title: Meet The Nuclear Base Employee Abducted By Aliens (Ft. Mario Woods)
summary: Mario Woods, a former US Air Force Security Police officer, recounts his 1977 experience at Ellsworth Air Force Base where he and his partner encountered a massive spherical craft hovering over a Minuteman II nuclear missile silo. The incident involved missing time, his partner entering a catatonic state, and an apparent encounter with non-human beings before being found miles away with no memory of how they got there.

acronyms.definition: Air Force investigative agency that questioned Woods after the incident
The security control center that communicated with and coordinated search for the missing security team

events.description: Mario Woods experienced a UFO encounter and missing time incident at November 5 missile silo near Ellsworth Air Force Base, South Dakota, in November 1977

Mario Woods returned to the November 1 launch control facility site and discovered additional details about the search for him and his partner, including involvement of state and federal law enforcement

key_claims.claim: A massive spherical craft the size of a Walmart building hovered approximately 10 feet above a Minuteman II nuclear missile silo blast door
The craft emitted an intense light that made it nearly impossible to breathe and caused temporary blindness
Woods observed four beings in uniforms gliding across the ground, with one taller being behind three smaller identical ones
Woods and his partner experienced approximately 5 hours of missing time, from around 12:20 AM to after 6:00 AM
The security team was found 8-8.5 miles away from their original destination at New Lake Reservoir Dam with no explanation of how they got there
Partner Michael Johnson remained in a catatonic state, gripping the steering wheel and unable to speak or respond
The craft responded to Woods flashing lights at it by flashing back in a similar pattern
A small black ball approximately six times the size of a beach ball with vent-like lines shot around their vehicle during the encounter
Rick Doty was present during Woods' debriefing at Ellsworth Air Force Base
Two deputy officers from Sturgis and one state trooper were called in to assist in searching for the missing security team
